headline: Is Pool Corp (POOL) Now Attractive After A 42% One Year Share Price Fall?
summary: If you are wondering whether Pool at around US$178.54 is starting to look interesting, the real question is how its price stacks up against its underlying worth. The stock has fallen 2.1% over the past week, 21.6% over the past month and 22.3% year to date, with the 1 year return down 42.0%, 3 year return down 44.6% and 5 year return down 55.5%. These moves have come as Pool continues to attract attention from investors who are reassessing what they are willing to pay for the stock in light...
